question: In the image, where is the person surfing? Select from the following options: (A) On a surfboard riding a large wave. (B) In a group of surfers riding waves. (C) Close to the shore. (D) In the middle of the ocean.
gold_answer: On a surfboard riding a large wave
answer_choices: On a surfboard riding a large wave
In a group of surfers riding waves
In the middle of the ocean
